meaning: n.古罗马公开表演的格斗者(通常都是奴隶和俘虏),精于辩论和格斗的人,职业拳击者
examples: The tickets for “Gladiator” have been sold out.
'Gladiator' and Mr. Crowe also won Academy Awards.
"And the Oscar goes to..." Gladiator Russel Crowe, an cast clean up the Oscars.
An ancient drawing of a gladiator has been carved into the rock, probably with a nail.
The movie will also reunite Crowe and Ridley, who worked together on the 2000 movie Gladiator.
